mapper.select: SELECT channel_code AS channelCode, channel_name AS channelName, payment_method AS paymentMethod, merchant_no AS merchantNo, callback_notify_url AS callbackNotifyUrl, CASE WHEN callback_secret IS NULL OR callback_secret = '' THEN '未配置' ELSE '已配置' END AS callbackSecretMasked, scene_scope AS sceneScope, status, status_type AS statusType, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(daily_limit, 2)) AS dailyLimit, priority, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_payment_channel_config ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC

SELECT rule_code AS ruleCode, rule_name AS ruleName, match_scene AS matchScene, match_expression AS matchExpression, target_channel_code AS targetChannelCode, fallback_channel_code AS fallbackChannelCode, status, status_type AS statusType, priority, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_payment_route_rule_config ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC

SELECT protocol_code AS protocolCode, protocol_name AS protocolName, protocol_type AS protocolType, protocol_type_name AS protocolTypeName, template_code AS templateCode, template_name AS templateName, template_version AS templateVersion, sign_mode AS signMode, sign_element_spec AS signElementSpec, e_signature_provider AS eSignatureProvider, scene_scope AS sceneScope, channel_scope AS channelScope, merchant_ack_required AS merchantAckRequired, risk_control_tag AS riskControlTag, protocol_body AS protocolBody, priority, status, status_type AS statusType, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_payment_protocol_config ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC

SELECT 'PAYMENT_SIGN' AS protocolType, '支付签约协议' AS protocolTypeName, '适用于正向支付签约、扣款授权和实名确认场景' AS description UNION ALL SELECT 'PREAUTH' AS protocolType, '预授权协议' AS protocolTypeName, '适用于企业客户预授权、押金冻结和后续确认扣款场景' AS description UNION ALL SELECT 'WITHHOLD' AS protocolType, '代扣协议' AS protocolTypeName, '适用于会员续费、周期扣款和静默代扣授权场景' AS description

SELECT protocol_code AS protocolCode, protocol_name AS protocolName, protocol_type AS protocolType, protocol_type_name AS protocolTypeName, template_code AS templateCode, template_name AS templateName, template_version AS templateVersion, sign_mode AS signMode, sign_element_spec AS signElementSpec, e_signature_provider AS eSignatureProvider, scene_scope AS sceneScope, channel_scope AS channelScope, merchant_ack_required AS merchantAckRequired, risk_control_tag AS riskControlTag, protocol_body AS protocolBody, status, status_type AS statusType, priority FROM t_payment_protocol_config WHERE protocol_code = #{protocolCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT channel_code AS channelCode, channel_return_code AS channelReturnCode, standardized_code AS standardizedCode, standardized_message AS standardizedMessage, handling_suggestion AS handlingSuggestion, retryable, status, status_type AS statusType, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_payment_channel_return_code_map ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC

SELECT gateway_code AS gatewayCode, gateway_name AS gatewayName, access_mode AS accessMode, channel_scope AS channelScope, api_base_url AS apiBaseUrl, protocol_type AS protocolType, sign_algorithm AS signAlgorithm, CONCAT(timeout_ms, 'ms') AS timeoutMs, retry_policy AS retryPolicy, status, status_type AS statusType, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_payment_gateway_config ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC

SELECT channel_code AS channelCode, payment_method AS paymentMethod, scene_scope AS sceneScope, daily_limit AS dailyLimit, priority FROM t_payment_channel_config WHERE status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC

SELECT channel_code AS channelCode, payment_method AS paymentMethod, scene_scope AS sceneScope, daily_limit AS dailyLimit, priority FROM t_payment_channel_config WHERE channel_code = #{channelCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT rule_code AS ruleCode, rule_name AS ruleName, match_scene AS matchScene, match_expression AS matchExpression, target_channel_code AS targetChannelCode, fallback_channel_code AS fallbackChannelCode, priority FROM t_payment_route_rule_config WHERE status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_payment_channel_config SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE channel_code = #{channelCode}
UPDATE t_payment_route_rule_config SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE rule_code = #{ruleCode}
UPDATE t_payment_protocol_config SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE protocol_code = #{protocolCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payment_protocol_config ( protocol_code, protocol_name, protocol_type, protocol_type_name, template_code, template_name, template_version, sign_mode, sign_element_spec, e_signature_provider, scene_scope, channel_scope, merchant_ack_required, risk_control_tag, protocol_body, status, status_type, priority, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{protocolCode}, #{protocolName}, #{protocolType}, #{protocolTypeName}, #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{templateVersion}, #{signMode}, #{signElementSpec}, #{eSignatureProvider}, #{sceneScope}, #{channelScope}, #{merchantAckRequired}, #{riskControlTag}, #{protocolBody}, #{status}, #{statusType}, #{priority}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_payment_protocol_config SET protocol_name = #{protocolName}, protocol_type = #{protocolType}, protocol_type_name = #{protocolTypeName}, template_code = #{templateCode}, template_name = #{templateName}, template_version = #{templateVersion}, sign_mode = #{signMode}, sign_element_spec = #{signElementSpec}, e_signature_provider = #{eSignatureProvider}, scene_scope = #{sceneScope}, channel_scope = #{channelScope}, merchant_ack_required = #{merchantAckRequired}, risk_control_tag = #{riskControlTag}, protocol_body = #{protocolBody}, status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, priority = #{priority}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE protocol_code = #{protocolCode}
UPDATE t_payment_gateway_config SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE gateway_code = #{gatewayCode}
